title: Emergency Food Clearinghouses - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Food > Emergency Food Clearinghouses 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO SNAP AND FOOD ACCESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The 211info SNAP and Food Access program provides specialized information, referral, advocacy, follow-up services, and extra guidance to individuals and family members who would like to access the SNAP program, have a question or issue with their current SNAP case, and/or need extra guidance accessing food resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details FOOD FOR LANE COUNTY FOOD PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects people to emergency and supplemental food programs, such as food pantries, meal sites, gleaning programs, community gardening opportunities, and nutrition education. FOOD for Lane County is a food bank that distributes food to partner agencies and food pantries. Those partners distribute food to people in their service areas. No food is given out through the administrative office. Eligibility: Varies by program, must meet USDA income guideline for food pantry Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 343-2822 Visit Website More Details YAMHILL COMMUNITY ACTION PARTNERSHIP REGIONAL FOOD BANK YAMHILL REGIONAL FOOD BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides surplus and donated food to agencies and programs for distribution. Agencies may include independent emergency food box pantries, congregate meal sites, and mobile food pantry sites. Food donations are welcome. 1317 NE Dustin Court McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours (503) 883-4170 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAMHILL COMMUNITY ACTION PARTNERSHIP REGIONAL FOOD BANK YAMHILL REGIONAL FOOD BANK
